title: OFFICE OF INSPECTOR GENERAL HOTLINE - 211info
text: UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF STATE OFFICE OF INSPECTOR GENERAL HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Fields allegations regarding fraud, waste, abuse, mismanagement, or misconduct affecting Department of State programs and operations. 2201 C Street NW Washington, DC 20037 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (202) 647-3320 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (202) 647-3320 Toll-free (800) 409-9926 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to make a report FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - OFFICE OF AMERICAN CITIZENS SERVICES AND CRISIS MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF STATE
